headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Overweight on Smurfit WestRock, Lowers Price Target to $60
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Brian Morton   maintains Smurfit WestRock (NYSE:SW) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $61 to $60.
